update.name: CVE-2026-24061

update.name: CVE-2025-68921
update.description: 🔍 Identify and understand the local privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2025-68921) in Nahimic audio software, impacting many gaming laptops.

update.name: CVE-2026-41089-LongLogon
update.description: CVE-2026-41089 checker: unauthenticated, non-destructive detection for the Netlogon CLDAP stack buffer overflow (CVSS 9.8). Reports whether a domain controller's domain is long enough to crash, without sending the overflow. The binary-verified analysis the public PoCs got wrong.
